title: Remediate quality-suite violations with wrapper-first loops
scope: Fix implementation defects surfaced by pre-commit hooks and rerun wrapper checks until targeted files pass.

commands.name: targeted_precommit
commands.purpose: Run remediation loops for touched paths and refresh skip ledgers.

commands.name: single_hook
commands.purpose: Isolate one failing hook while preserving wrapper bookkeeping.

commands.name: closeout_precommit
commands.purpose: Run full quality gate suite before session close.

validations.name: wrapper_reports_pass
validations.pass_condition: Summary block reports success and no unresolved violations.

validations.name: checklist_handoff
validations.pass_condition: Any unresolved work is captured as granular open entries.

done_when: Touched paths pass wrapper-driven pre-commit checks.
Full pre-commit suite has been executed once for closure.
Open remediation tasks are represented as actionable checklist entries.
